description: Zoomable full resolution image available at davidrumsey.com . This image 1054.023 is a part of image group 1054.000 . Map in color. Details physical and cultural features. Relief shown by shading. Maps drawn in Phillipines, published in U.S. P3225.
title: No. 23. Bohol. Islas Filipinas Observatorio de Manila. United States Coast and Geodetic Survey. No. 23. Longitud E. del Meridiano de Greenwich. A. Hoen & Co., Baltimore. (1899)
